titleStmt.title: SII 34.4: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 4. Tirumaṇañjēri, Mayiladuturai Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Udvāhanāthasvāmin temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Parakēsarivarman Vikramachōḻa, 5th year, Makara, sudi. 10, Wednesday, Mṛigaśīra = A.D. 1123, February 7, Wednesday.

Sale of land by the mahāsabhā of Karikālachōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Kuṟukkai-nāḍu of Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu on the north bank, which assembled at the temple of Karikālachōḻa-viṇṇagar-Āḻvār in the village. The sale was made to pay off some tax arrears of those landholders of the village who left the village without paying their land dues. The land was purchased by a Pūṇḍi-uḍaiyāṉ Uyyavandāṉ Ñānaśivar for instituting some services in the temple praying for the health of the king (tiruvāymoḻindaruḷum tirumēni) and his family.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ pūmātu puṇa
rap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu vi
ḷaṅka jayamātu virumpat taṉ
niru patumalar maṉṉavar cūṭa maṉṉi
ya Urimaiyil maṇimuṭi cūṭic
ceṅkōl ceṉṟu ticaiyoṭu vaḷaṟ
pa veṅkali nīṅki meyyaṟan taḻaippak
kaliṅkamiriyak kaṭamalai naṭātti vala
ṅkoḷāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭātti Iru cuṭa
raḷavum Orukuṭai niḻaṟṟi virasimhāsa
nattu mukkōṟkkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum
vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kōpparakēcari paṉmarāṉa
śrīvikkrama cōḻa tēvarkku yāṇṭu 5 vatu
(vatu) makara nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu
daśamiyumputaṉ kiḻamaiyum māṉa miruka
cīratti nāḷ vaṭakarai virutarāja payaṅkara vaḷanāṭ
ṭu kuṟukkai
nāṭṭu karikā
�llāḻa caru
pēti maṅkalattu mahāsabhai
yōm Eṅkaḷ Ūr naṭuviṟ tiru
muṟṟam karikāla cōḻa viṇṇaka
r Āḻvār kōyililē kūṭṭa kuṟai
ṟavaṟa kūṭiyiruntu
ṉṟu Iṟaiyiṟukka māṭṭātār
kkum nilai nillātu pōnārkkum nima
ni mu Ivvūrkku Iṟukka vēṇṭu
kayil Iṟai cela nilaṅkaḷ sabhai vi
lai viṟṟum tēvarkaḷukkum Iṟaiyili cey
tum Iṟuppatāka sabhāvyavasthaiyum rāja
nilam lum Uyya
kkoṇṭāṉ vaḷa nāṭṭu tiraimūr nāṭṭu
tiru Uṭaiyārkku mulabhratya
ṉāṉa caṇ[ ṭēśvara] tēvarkku nāṅka
ḷ vilai yiṟai ṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta pari
cāvatu
tiru yi
ṟaiyili
tiruvāy moḻi
ntaruḷut tirumē
ṉikkum tirukku
lattukkum na
ṉṟāka devarai pū
jittu Upāsi
ttirukku n=tapasyar
nā
ṭṭuppi
ṭṭuppūṇṭiyuṭai
yāṉ
yyavantānāṉa ñāna ci
var tām pūjikkum bā
ṇaliṅka tEvaṟkkum pi
tākkaḷ pūjikkum mahāde
varkkum tirumēṉikaḷukkun ti
ruvamutu Uḷḷiṭṭa nitta
kum viṣu
leṟṟu
Uḷḷiṭ
nā ṭu
I tēvar
yārkku pparicārakark
kum ma(ṭ)ṭattil vanta Apū
rvanitta pūcakarāṉa māheśva
rarkkuṇṇavum vēṇṭum ni
mantaṅkaḷ can=tirātittavaṟ ce
la kku Iññāṉa civar tam
n=tāmiraṇaṅ koṇṭu
nittamit ti
rumaṇañcēri Uṭaiyār sannidhiyi
l śrīñāṉacivar kaiyyāl koṇ
ṭakācu 31ikkācu muppattoṉṟuṅ
koṇṭu Ittēvarkku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟu
iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilamāva
tu Anātippiḷḷaip pottakat
ku kāṇi yāṉ peri sabhai
potu vāyppaṇi kku
Ayaṉa kirāṇaṅkaḷ tirunāḷukkiṭṭu nilamēl kuṭṭakkaḷiyeṉṟu pēr kūvappaṭṭa nilattukkuk kīḻpārk
kellai
pāratāya
ṉ kōnā
ṭāṉnā
ṉa kuṭṭakka
ḷikkuṅ kau
ciyaṉ ve
ḷḷaippaṉṟi
kāḷamēkatti
ṉilattukkumi
vaṉpakkal sa
bhaiyār vi
laikoṇṭu It
tēvarkkiṟaiyili ce
ykiṟa nilattukku nīrpā
yak kuṭutta vāykkā
lukku mēṟkil mēlva
rampil cempātikkutte
ṉpārkkellai Eṭṭu mā
varampil cempātikku
kum
mēlpāṟ
kellai
vā
ykkāluk
kukkiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ
kellai kavuṇiya tirucciṟṟa
mpalamuṭaiyāṉ taḻuvakku
ḻai cem
pātikkut teṟkumivvicai
ratta Iṉṉāṉ kellai
yilum paṭṭa nilatti
kōlāl viḷainilaṅkuḻi 1000 3 10 8(1/4)
yiṉṉilattukku maṅkalavā
yniṉṟum nīrpāyak kōciyaṉ ve
ḷḷaippaṉṟi kāḷamēkattiniṭai sabhai
yōm koṇṭu kuṭutta vākkāl kuḻi pati
ṉālu muṭpaṭa viḷainilaṅkuḻi 1000 5 10 2(1/4)
m va vellaiyuḷ Iṟaiyilā
ṭaiyakollai
kac ceytu kuṭutta kuḻi 4 100 3 10 6 mākak kōl
ciṟṟampalamuṭaiya paṇiyālum kota yālum cōti kēcavaṉāṟ paṇiyālum pāratāyat tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān tiruvāruraṭikaḷ paṇiyālum kōciyan muttāṉ pavaḻakkuṉṟaṉ paṇiyālu māritaṉ cīrāmaṉ catiranār paṇiyālum paṇikkap paṇi kēṭṭu Ivvilai
maṅkalamuṭaiyā nampalakkūttaṉ ravarata Eḻuttum kavuṇiyan=tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyāṉ taḻuvakkuḻaiṉtā neḻuttu tirucciṟṟamuṭaiyāṉ taḻuvakkuḻaintā neḻuttu tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā nāḷavan=tāneḻuttum ciṅkaḷa ve neḻuttum gaudamaṉ ciṅkanāraāyaṇa neḻuttum cōtikēcava neḻuttum
ttum tēvaneḻuttum ciṅkaṉ poṟkā neḻuttum kauciyaṉ veḷḷaippaṉṟi kāḷamēkattineḻuttum muttaṉ taḻuvakkuḻaintā neḻuttum pāratāyan=tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāt tiruvārūr makā kēcavaṉāccipiṭāra neḻuttum Āritaṉ cīrāmaṉ citaraneḻuttum talaccaṅkāṭṭu pā
ttum puṟavūrār palaneḻuttumitupaṉmā heśvararakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 34.4 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
